title: alcicornium stemaria
side_effects: Alcicornium stemaria can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches. In extreme cases, excessive consumption can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, or even cardiac arrest. Some users may also experience allergic reactions, such as itching, swelling, or rashes on the skin. Additionally, it can interact with other medications, causing unpredictable changes in blood pressure, heart rate, or other vital signs.
